features: рқҗ–рқҗҮрқҗҳ рқҗӮрқҗҮрқҗҺрқҗҺрқҗ’рқҗ„ рқҗ‘рқҗҖрқҗ–рқҗҖрқҗҮрқҗҖ рқҗҢрқҗҲрқҗ’рқҗ–рқҗҖрқҗҖрқҗҠ: The RAWAHA Miswak is a natural toothbrush crafted from the Salvadora Persica tree. It offers a safe, chemical-free, and cost-effective way to maintain oral hygiene. These sticks are efficient, affordable, and easy to find, making them a practical choice for everyday dental care

рқҗҒрқҗ„рқҗҚрқҗ„рқҗ…рқҗҲрқҗ“рқҗ’ рқҗҺрқҗ… рқҗҢрқҗҲрқҗ’рқҗ–рқҗҖрқҗҠ: RAWAHA Miswak sticks help prevent plaque build-up with natural ingredients that fight the bacteria responsible for tartar. They also freshen breath, improve taste bud sensitivity, and support overall oral cleanliness.

рқҗ“рқҗ‘рқҗ”рқҗ’рқҗ“рқҗ„рқҗғ рқҗ…рқҗҺрқҗ‘ рқҗӮрқҗ„рқҗҚрқҗ“рқҗ”рқҗ‘рқҗҲрқҗ„рқҗ’: Traditionally used across many cultures for oral health. The Miswak is a natural, chemical-free teeth cleaning tool suitable for all ages.It helps keep teeth feeling fresh. However, itвҖҷs worth noting that the treeвҖҷs roots retain moisture better than its branches.

рқҗҚрқҗҖрқҗ“рқҗ”рқҗ‘рқҗҖрқҗӢрқҗӢрқҗҳ рқҗ…рқҗӢрқҗҖрқҗ•рқҗҺрқҗ‘рқҗ„рқҗғ: Offers a mild, pleasant taste derived from the Salvadora Persica tree itself. No artificial flavors or additivesвҖ”just pure, natural freshness.

рқҗҮрқҗҺрқҗ– рқҗ“рқҗҺ рқҗ”рқҗ’рқҗ„: Choose a Miswak stick about the length of your hand. If it becomes dry, soak it in water to soften the bristles. For optimal hygiene, trim the used end and expose a fresh section regularly.
description: Product Description Choose Sizes to Suit Your Needs Choose Sizes to Suit Your Needs We have Pack of 4 and Pack of 12 . Each pack is designed for convenience, whether you're new to these siwak sticks for teeth or a long-time siwak toothbrush enthusiast. Choose sizes to suit your needs. Convenient for Travelling Natural Bristles It has gentle cleaning with natural bristles. Polishes tooth surface naturally without damaging enamel. Traditional Wisdom Traditional Wisdom, Modern Health вҖ“ A time-tested tool now recommended by dentists for holistic oral care. Fresh Breath Naturally freshens breath by removing odor-causing bacteria.Chemical-free alternative to commercial breath fresheners.
